app.name: Yuem
app.description: A clean XHS-style planning and media feed.

error.access_blocked: Access has been blocked by the current access policy.
error.api_key_rate_limited: Too many failed API key checks. Try again later.
error.balance_center_not_configured: The User Center balance API is not configured.
error.invalid_file_recycle_setting: File recycle bin settings are invalid.
error.invalid_redis_maintenance_config: The Redis maintenance configuration is invalid.

account.title: Account capabilities
account.description: Verification profile and account identity tools.
account.verificationDescription: Submit personal or official verification details
account.networkDiagnosticsDescription: View current IP, Geo, CDN, and privacy risks

privacy.title: Privacy settings
privacy.description: Control whether birthday, age, zodiac sign, and MBTI appear on your profile.

birthday.title: Birthday
birthday.description: Control whether others can see your birthday.

age.title: Age
age.description: Control whether your profile shows the age calculated from your birthday.

zodiac.title: Zodiac sign
zodiac.description: Control whether others can see your zodiac sign.

mbti.title: MBTI
mbti.description: Control whether others can see your MBTI.

loginRequired.title: Sign in to update settings
loginRequired.description: Sign in to read and save your system settings.

aiAutoComment.title: AI auto comments
aiAutoComment.description: When turned off, AI will not automatically comment on your posts. Replies summoned by other users with @yueai still work.

video.unavailable: No playable video URL is available.

login.title: Log in to unlock more
login.description: Log in to keep browsing, liking, saving, and commenting.

errors.missingLogin: Enter email or account and password.
errors.missingRegister: Enter account, nickname, email, and password.
errors.loginFailed: The email/account or password is incorrect.
errors.registerFailed: Registration failed. Check the fields and try again.
errors.emailCodeFailed: Could not send the email code.
errors.geetestUnavailable: Password registration is unavailable while GeeTest verification is enabled.

login.configLoadFailed: Authorization settings could not be loaded. The default sign-in entry will be used.
login.oauthOnly: Log in to unlock more content.
login.oauthPrompt: Log in to continue with the full experience.
login.oauthStatusFailed: OAuth2 sign-in status could not be confirmed. Please try again.
login.nativeStateFailed: The app sign-in request expired or did not match. Please try again.
login.nativeExchangeFailed: The app could not finish signing in. Please try again.
login.nativeExchangeFailedWithDetail: The app could not finish signing in: {detail}
login.nativeOffline: You are offline. Yuem will reconnect automatically.
login.nativeCallbackDescription: Authorization is complete. Open the Yuem app to continue.
login.nativeCallbackInvalid: This authorization link is invalid or has expired.

nativeStatus.title: App sign-in did not finish
nativeStatus.callbackReceived: The browser callback reached the app and sign-in is being processed.
nativeStatus.stateFailed: The sign-in request expired or does not match this app session. Please start sign-in again.
nativeStatus.oauthError: User Center returned an authorization failure.
nativeStatus.missingCode: The browser callback did not include a login ticket.
nativeStatus.tokenExchangeFailed: The app failed to exchange the login token.
nativeStatus.tokenStorageFailed: The app received a token, but failed to store the local sign-in state.
nativeStatus.profileFailed: The app stored a token, but could not verify the current user.
nativeStatus.signedIn: The app sign-in state has been stored.
nativeStatus.unknown: The app sign-in failed for an unknown reason.

loginUnlock.title: Sign in to unlock more
loginUnlock.description: Sign in to keep browsing, liking, saving, and joining the conversation.

maintenance.title: System maintenance in progress
maintenance.defaultMessage: The service is under maintenance. Please come back later.
maintenance.entryHint: Use the dedicated link from an administrator to enter service mode.

entry.title: Entering service mode
entry.checking: Checking the entry code and preparing your session...
entry.success: Entry verified. Opening the site now.
entry.error: This entry is invalid or expired. Contact an administrator.

appDownload.title: Yuem App
appDownload.description: Choose the package for your device. Download links, versions, and app names are managed in system settings.
appDownload.featureThirdPartyLogin: Supports Google, Discord, Steam, and more third-party login
appDownload.featureNativeBridge: Returns to the App automatically after browser login
